summary: First testing pass for Olevia aromatherapy site. Backend: 17/18 pytest tests pass (94%). Frontend: All critical flows verified - Home/Products/Blogs/BlogDetail/Login/Admin/Mobile work; Inquire modal renders WhatsApp+Email+Copy; admin CRUD works end-to-end; route guard correct; no Add to Cart anywhere. Cleaned up curl test post.

minor.issue: Returns 404. Root route is declared on line 575 AFTER `app.include_router(api_router)` on line 539, so it's not registered. Move the route declaration above include_router (or use @app.get). Not a user-facing bug since the frontend doesn't call /api/.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking the logout button while on /admin, user lands on /login (because ProtectedRoute redirects), not on the home page as the spec describes ('returns to home'). Minor UX deviation - consider navigating to '/' explicitly in the logout handler before route-guard kicks in.

issues: Mobile menu overlay backdrop is too transparent — the hero headline bleeds through behind 'Home / Shop / Journal' links, hurting readability. Increase backdrop opacity or add a solid cream background to the mobile menu container.

action_items: Move @api_router.get('/') above app.include_router(api_router) so /api/ returns 200 instead of 404 (cosmetic; frontend does not call it).
Make logout redirect explicitly to '/' instead of relying on route-guard fallback to /login (matches spec 'returns to home').
Tighten mobile menu backdrop — currently too transparent on Home page (text bleed-through).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 575: route ordering bug — declaring routes after include_router has no effect.
Auth playbook: bcrypt is used correctly ($2b$ hashes), JWT secret from env, idempotent seed_admin updates password if changed. Good.
No httpOnly cookie auth — only Bearer token in localStorage (acceptable for this admin-only app, but worth noting that XSS would expose the token).
No brute-force / rate-limit on /api/auth/login. Currently unlimited password attempts return 401 — recommend lockout after 5 fails per IP/email.
Inquire modal correctly uses WhatsApp share URL + mailto: external intents — no checkout, as required.
No MongoDB ObjectId leaks observed in any response (all queries project {_id:0}).
seed_data_creation: None new. Backend auto-seeds 1 admin + 12 products + 5 blogs idempotently on startup. Cleaned up the leftover 'Test Post By Curl' blog after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_olevia_backend.py covers auth (login success/fail, /me with/without token), products (list + 4 category filters), blogs public (list/sort/get-by-slug/404), and full admin CRUD with auto-slug regeneration on title change. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_olevia_backend.py -v. Known acceptable failure: TestHealth.test_root expects /api/ 200 but server returns 404 due to route ordering — main agent will fix.
rca of the issue: TestHealth.test_root failure RCA: in /app/backend/server.py, `app.include_router(api_router)` runs at line 539 but `@api_router.get('/')` is declared at line 575. FastAPI's APIRouter snapshots its routes when included; later declarations on the same router are NOT picked up. Fix: move the root handler above line 539 OR re-include the router after declaring it OR change to `@app.get('/api/')`. Reproduction: curl https://olevia-healing.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ → 404. Mitigation: low priority — frontend does not call this endpoint.
